text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day during training, Eishin Flash
unexpectedly stops in her tracks.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: Huff, huff! For some reason, my legs feel heavier than usual.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Finishing within the allotted time will be
impossible at my current pace...

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
I'll have to push myself harder to keep on track
with the schedule...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She must be fatigued from all the races she's been
running. Looks like I need to rethink her race
schedule.
